versions.label: v8.9.0 — Platform Refactor
versions.summary: Plugin/Integration symbiosis, agent identity taxonomy, formation TB layout, PlanePmAlign GenServer, JSONL session scanning, SimpleAgentsPlugin v2.0.
features: Agent identity taxonomy: agent_name, agent_type, agent_definition stored in AgentRegistry with normalize_agent_type/1
PluginBehaviour optional callbacks: nav_items/0, settings_path/0, plugin_live_module/0, plugin_integrations/0
IntegrationBehaviour symbiosis: required_plugin/0, target_native_feature/0 cross-reference wiring
Formation graph TB (top-bottom) 4th layout mode + namespace bounding rectangle hulls
Dashboard dep graph project-level grouping + inactive project collapse toggle
Notification grouped view by category with collapse/expand; buffer cap 2000
SessionManager JSONL scan: load_jsonl_sessions/0 reads ~/.claude/projects/*/*.jsonl
PlanePmAlign GenServer: polls Plane API every 5min, broadcasts plane:sync PubSub
RalphPluginLive at /plugins/ralph (PRD/Formation/History tabs)
AgUiPluginLive at /plugins/ag_ui (Events/Agents/Config tabs)

SimpleAgentsPlugin v2.0.0: 11 coalesced actions (workspace_info, list_agents, list_tools, list_traces, get_trace, list_tasks, get_metrics, trace_summary, provider_stats, list_workflows, parity_status)

versions.label: v8.6.0 — AgentLock Reliability
versions.summary: Approve/Deny buttons in notification panel, global in-browser approval modal on all pages, CCEMHelper direct macOS notification delivery with action buttons.
features: NotificationLive: phx-click Approve/Deny buttons for agentlock category (replaced broken href links)
GET /api/v2/auth/decide: browser-clickable approval URL, redirects to /authorization
NamespaceResolver: rescue ArgumentError when ETS table not yet initialized
Global AgentLock modal in root.html.heex: polls every 2.5s, z-[9999] overlay on all pages
AGENTLOCK_APPROVAL UNNotificationCategory with Approve/Deny macOS action buttons in CCEMHelper
CCEMHelper Test Notification button in SettingsView
AuthorizationLive full-screen overlay with 20s CountdownTimer
DashboardLive compact floating banner strip with inline Approve/Deny

versions.label: v8.5.0 — Namespace UX + Azure Tunnel
versions.summary: Human-readable scoped labels, 20-second decision windows, Azure Container Apps remote tunnel with multi-project routing.
features: NamespaceResolver GenServer: agent_label/session_label/gate_label via ETS :namespace_cache
PendingDecisions TTL: 120s → 20s; sweep interval: 15s → 3s
DecisionGate default timeout: 120s → 20s
AuthorizationLive: CountdownTimer JS hook, real-time PubSub approval banners
ccem-relay Phoenix project: deployed to Azure Container Apps
ApmV5.Tunnel.Client GenServer: outbound WebSocket via :gun, Phoenix v2 framing, auto-reconnect
Multi-project tunnel routing: /p/{project}/... path prefix stripping
Public URL: https://ccem-relay.wonderfulflower-c29529fc.eastus.azurecontainerapps.io

versions.label: v8.4.0 — Agent Inspector + Formation Views
versions.summary: UPM plan inspector panel, formation multi-view modes (Graph/List/Grid), AG-UI context tracking, DecisionGate, ShowcaseChannel.
features: UPM plan inspector pull-out column in WorkflowLive: toggle_inspector, select_story, close_inspector
Formation multi-view modes: Graph TD, Graph LR, Hierarchical List, Card Grid
AgentContextStore GenServer: AG-UI context per agent_id via ETS :agent_context
DecisionGate GenServer: interactive decision gating with CCEMHelper notification + osascript
ShowcaseChannel Phoenix Channel: showcase:* topic, real-time push of agent/notification events
ShowcaseSyncHook/ShowcaseSyncClient: JS LiveView hook + Phoenix client with auto-retry
AgentPanel: activity label, formation hierarchy badges, AG-UI context column
Coalesce foundation: CoalesceOrchestrator, CoalesceSupervisor, SkillLogicEngine, SwarmCoordinator

versions.label: v8.3.0 — Universal Notifications
versions.summary: All 19 APM subsystems broadcast via NotificationBroadcaster. GettingStarted wizard with inline SVG fallbacks. CoWork session awareness.
features: NotificationBroadcaster: universal coverage across all 19 subsystems
GettingStarted wizard: SVG_FALLBACKS[5] inline SVGs per slide, Lottie animates on CDN load
CoWork awareness in SessionManager: reads ~/.claude/teams/ + ~/.claude/tasks/

versions.label: v8.2.0 — AgentLock Refinements
versions.summary: agent_name through auth pipeline, destructive command detection, reliable CCEMHelper notification delivery, Gap 9 approval fix.
features: agent_name propagated through full authorization pipeline from hook to audit log
Destructive command detection: rm -rf, DROP TABLE, git push --force trigger critical risk
POST /api/v2/notifications/test: injects test audit entry, delivers macOS banner within 10s
CCEMHelper Settings scene (Cmd+comma) as system-level window
UNUserNotificationCenter.delegate set in CCEMHelperApp.init() for reliable banner delivery
agentlock_pre_tool.sh Gap 9 fix: polls GET /api/v2/auth/pending/:id?wait=30, receives token_id

versions.label: v8.1.0 — Session Manager
versions.summary: SessionManager GenServer polling all active claude sessions, SessionManagerLive with 5-tab detail panel, CCEMHelper Settings/About/Help.
features: ApmV5.SessionManager: polls ~/Developer/ccem/apm/sessions/*.json every 30s, ETS :session_manager_cache
SessionManagerLive at /sessions and /sessions/:id: split-panel with 5 tabs (Overview, Claude Config, Agents, Ports, Plugins)
CCEMHelper SettingsView: APM URL config, notification toggles, Launch at Login, connection test
CCEMHelper AboutView: version/build from bundle, GitHub link, Open APM Dashboard
CCEMHelper HelpView: Quick Start, Keyboard Shortcuts, Troubleshooting sections

versions.label: v8.0.0 — Plugin/Integration Engine
versions.summary: Full modular plugin architecture with PluginBehaviour and IntegrationBehaviour contracts. 32-agent formation deployment for migration.
features: PluginBehaviour: plugin_name/0, plugin_description/0, plugin_version/0, list_endpoints/0, handle_action/3
IntegrationBehaviour: integration_name/0, integration_description/0, handle_integration/2
PluginRegistry GenServer + ETS :plugin_registry with auto-registration on init
API router restructured with labeled scope blocks: core, auth, formation, upm, showcase, usage
GET /api/v2/manifest: API surface manifest with core vs extension classification

versions.label: v7.3.0 — Plugin Engine + Plane PM
versions.summary: First plugin integration: Plane PM with live Kanban board, issue inspector drawer, and pre_tool_use plugin context enrichment.
features: ApmV5.Plugins.PluginBehaviour behaviour contract
ApmV5.Plugins.PluginRegistry GenServer + ETS :plugin_registry
ApmV5.Plugins.Plane.PlanePlugin: list_issues, get_issue, list_projects, board_state, search_issues
PluginDashboardLive at /plugins: MCP Servers / Discovered / Registered tabs
Plane Kanban board with issue inspector pull-out drawer
pre_tool_use.sh plugin_context enrichment: emits {engine, plugin_name} in heartbeat context

versions.label: v7.0.0 — AgentLock Authorization System
versions.summary: Full agent authorization gating: PolicyEngine, TokenStore, SessionStore, RateLimiter, ContextTracker, MemoryGate, RedactionEngine, hooks, CCEMHelper integration.
features: Auth.PolicyEngine: stateless risk evaluation with default tool risk map (low/medium/high/critical)
Auth.TokenStore: ETS-backed atk_ tokens with SHA-256 param binding, 15-min TTL
Auth.SessionStore: dual-indexed ETS by session_id and agent_id, monotonic trust
Auth.RateLimiter: sliding window rate limiting per {user, tool} pair
Auth.ContextTracker: trust/provenance tracking with monotonic degradation
Auth.MemoryGate: 7 prohibited patterns for memory write operations
Auth.RedactionEngine: 7 regex patterns, auto/manual/none redaction modes
Auth.AgentLifecycle: state machine module (spawned → authenticating → authorized → running → completing → terminated)
AuthorizationLive: 4-tab dashboard (Overview, Audit Log, Tokens, Sessions)
RoutingLive: D3.js authorization flow graph
agentlock_pre_tool.sh: PreToolUse authorization hook
agentlock_post_tool.sh: PostToolUse execution recording hook
CCEMHelper AuthorizationModels.swift + auth integration in MenuBarView
